customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of excellent quality, with one noting it's the best in class. The installation process receives positive feedback, with one customer mentioning it's completely free of cost. Moreover, the product offers good value for money, particularly in terms of service costs, and customers appreciate its premium appearance and excellent taste. Additionally, the water quality is consistently good, with one customer specifically mentioning the technician's thorough water quality check, and the service process receives praise for being professional.

reviews.author: NK
reviews.title: Good start with water filter
reviews.body: Filter works very well. Used 3 days now and no issues. Unit looks good. Large in size though, so check dimensions and see whether it fits in your home. Installation was very well coordinated and smooth. No ‘add on’ charges. If exchanging old filter, keep in mind to detach old filter to have ready for handing over to Amazon’s delivery agent. Will post another update after further 1-2 years usage. Will validate filer change period and also cost reduction filter is supposed to provide due to reduced frequency of filter change.

reviews.author: Placeholder
reviews.title: Good product and service
reviews.body: Good flow and low tds. Filtration working well. I recently purchased the product based on good reviews from my neighbours who are using same product. Internal plastic body looks flimsy and could be better.

reviews.author: R. S.
reviews.title: Tap is the problem
reviews.body: Everything is OK but the problem is the tap...it's really a big problem if not used carefully..I would say conventional taps which other purifier provide, is far better!!!

reviews.author: Pullareddy
reviews.title: Native
reviews.body: Really good product! The water tastes completely pure and clean, and the build quality is excellent. Very happy with this purchase."

reviews.author: AdityA
reviews.title: Good Product
reviews.body: Value for money product no doubt. Have not used the in app feature till now but it looks feature rich and easy to use. The installation process was super smooth. Only negative I can think of is the nozzle is not compatible with extension pipes.
